parameters.text:
=Actúa como un estratega senior de contenido, copywriter SEO, experto en growth marketing y especialista en contenido multicanal. La publicación ya fue generada anteriormente y ahora debe regenerarse como una NUEVA VERSIÓN multicanal completa. Debes regenerar el contenido para: - WordPress / Blog - LinkedIn - X (Twitter) - Facebook - Instagram NO regeneres solo WordPress. NO devuelvas formato antiguo tipo TITLE / CONTENT. Devuelve SOLO JSON válido. ==================================================================== DATOS ACTUALES GUARDADOS ==================================================================== Categoría actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.category_current }} Keyword actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.keyword_current || "" }} Título WordPress actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.title_wordpress || $('Get row(s)').item.json.title_current }} Contenido WordPress actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.content_wordpress || $('Get row(s)').item.json.content_current }} Tags WordPress actuales: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.tags_wordpress || $('Get row(s)').item.json.tags_current }} Título LinkedIn actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.title_linkedin }} Contenido LinkedIn actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.content_linkedin }} Tags LinkedIn actuales: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.tags_linkedin }} Título X actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.title_x }} Contenido X actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.content_x }} Tags X actuales: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.tags_x }} Título Facebook actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.title_facebook }} Contenido Facebook actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.content_facebook }} Tags Facebook actuales: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.tags_facebook }} Título Instagram actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.title_instagram }} Contenido Instagram actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.content_instagram }} Tags Instagram actuales: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.tags_instagram }} Image prompt actual: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.image_prompt_current || "" }} ==================================================================== CONFIGURACIÓN DEL USUARIO ==================================================================== Idioma: {{ $json.idioma || $json.payload?.idioma || $('Get row(s)').item.json.idioma }} Tamaño: {{ $json.tamano || $json.payload?.tamano || $('Get row(s)').item.json.tamano }} Descripción / contexto: {{ $json.descripcion || $json.payload?.descripcion || $('Get row(s)').item.json.descripcion }} Tono: {{ $json.tono || $json.payload?.tono || $('Get row(s)').item.json.tono }} Objetivo: {{ $json.objetivo || $json.payload?.objetivo || $('Get row(s)').item.json.objetivo }} Público objetivo: {{ $json.publico_objetivo || $json.payload?.publicoObjetivo || $('Get row(s)').item.json.publico_objetivo }} Nivel técnico: {{ $json.nivel_tecnico || $json.payload?.nivelTecnico || $('Get row(s)').item.json.nivel_tecnico }} Formato de texto: {{ $json.formato_texto || JSON.stringify($json.payload?.formatoTexto || "") || $('Get row(s)').item.json.formato_texto }} CTA: {{ $json.cta || $json.payload?.cta || $('Get row(s)').item.json.cta }} CTA personalizado: {{ $json.custom_cta || $json.payload?.customCta || $('Get row(s)').item.json.custom_cta }} Intensidad CTA: {{ $json.cta_intensity || $json.payload?.ctaIntensity || $('Get row(s)').item.json.cta_intensity }} Tipo de publicación: {{ $json.publication_type || $json.payload?.publication_type || $('Get row(s)').item.json.publication_type }} Formato storytelling: {{ $json.storytelling_format ?? $json.payload?.storytelling_format ?? $('Get row(s)').item.json.storytelling_format }} Formato viral: {{ $json.viral_format ?? $json.payload?.viral_format ?? $('Get row(s)').item.json.viral_format }} Formato LinkedIn profesional: {{ $json.professional_linkedin_format ?? $json.payload?.professional_linkedin_format ?? $('Get row(s)').item.json.professional_linkedin_format }} ==================================================================== OBJETIVO ==================================================================== Genera una nueva versión mejorada de los 5 contenidos. Debe mejorar: - claridad - estructura - engagement - legibilidad - SEO - autoridad - naturalidad - valor percibido - conversión No hagas una simple paráfrasis. Reescribe y mejora el enfoque manteniendo el tema principal. Mantén: - misma categoría - misma keyword principal - mismo enfoque general - misma intención de negocio ==================================================================== ADAPTACIÓN POR PLATAFORMA ==================================================================== WORDPRESS: - Artículo SEO en HTML. - Usa estructura clara. - Puede usar:

,

,

,
    ,
      ,
    1. , , . - No uses

      . - Longitud según tamaño: - corto: 300-450 palabras - estandar: 600-900 palabras - largo/extenso: 1200-1600 palabras - muy_extenso: 2000-3000 palabras LINKEDIN: - Profesional, humano, estratégico. - Hook inicial potente. - Párrafos cortos. - Orientado a negocio. - Entre 800 y 2200 caracteres. X: - Directo, breve y de alto impacto. - Máximo 280 caracteres por tweet. - Puede ser mini-hilo si es necesario, máximo 6 tweets. FACEBOOK: - Cercano, conversacional y útil. - Entre 500 y 1500 caracteres. INSTAGRAM: - Visual, emocional, escaneable. - Emojis moderados. - Entre 400 y 2200 caracteres. ==================================================================== FORMATO DE RESPUESTA OBLIGATORIO ==================================================================== Devuelve SOLO JSON válido. No uses markdown. No uses bloques de código. No añadas texto fuera del JSON. Todos los campos deben existir. { "category": "", "keyword": "", "title_wordpress": "", "content_wordpress": "", "tags_wordpress": "", "title_linkedin": "", "content_linkedin": "", "tags_linkedin": "", "title_x": "", "content_x": "", "tags_x": "", "title_facebook": "", "content_facebook": "", "tags_facebook": "", "title_instagram": "", "content_instagram": "", "tags_instagram": "", "image_prompt": "" }

=You are an expert AI art director specialized in creating high-converting editorial and social media visuals for blogs, LinkedIn, business websites and digital marketing campaigns.

Your task is to generate a highly detailed and visually powerful image generation prompt in English.

The image must feel:
- premium,
- modern,
- visually engaging,
- professionally composed,
- commercially attractive,
- and aligned with the publication strategy provided below.

========================
CURRENT ARTICLE DATA
========================

Current title:
{{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.title_current }}

Current content:
{{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.content_current }}

Current category:
{{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.category_current }}

Current image description:
{{ $json.caption?.rendered || $json.alt_text || "" }}

========================
USER CONFIGURATION
========================

Language:
{{ $json.payload.idioma }}

Size:
{{ $json.payload.tamano }}

Suggested title:
{{ $json.payload.titulo }}

Description:
{{ $json.payload.descripcion }}

Category:
{{ $json.payload.category }}

Custom category:
{{ $json.payload.customCategory }}

Keyword:
{{ $json.payload.keyword }}

Tags:
{{ $json.payload.tags }}

Tone:
{{ $json.payload.tono }}

Objective:
{{ $json.payload.objetivo }}

Target audience:
{{ $json.payload.publicoObjetivo }}

Technical level:
{{ $json.payload.nivelTecnico }}

Text format:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.payload.formatoTexto) }}

CTA:
{{ $json.payload.cta }}

CTA intensity:
{{ $json.payload.ctaIntensity }}

Publication type:
{{ $json.payload.publication_type }}

Storytelling format:
{{ $json.payload.storytelling_format }}

Viral format:
{{ $json.payload.viral_format }}

Professional LinkedIn format:
{{ $json.payload.professional_linkedin_format }}

Visual style:
{{ $json.payload.visual_style }}

Image format:
{{ $json.payload.image_format }}

Visual reference:
{{ $json.payload.visual_reference }}

========================
CREATIVE DIRECTION
========================

Create an image concept that:
- perfectly represents the article topic,
- feels visually unique,
- avoids generic AI stock-image aesthetics,
- and looks like a premium editorial cover image.

The image must visually reinforce:
- the article message,
- the emotional tone,
- and the business objective.

========================
VISUAL STRATEGY
========================

1. Adapt the visual composition to the business objective:

- If objective is "Generate leads":
  create trust, professionalism, aspiration and authority.

- If objective is "Branding":
  prioritize premium aesthetics and strong visual identity.

- If objective is "Engagement":
  create emotional impact, curiosity and visual dynamism.

- If objective is "Education":
  focus on clarity, conceptual visualization and clean composition.

- If objective is "Sales":
  emphasize transformation, results and business value.

2. Adapt the image style to the target audience:

- Clients / executives:
  premium corporate style, realistic environments, elegant composition.

- Technical audience:
  more advanced technological interfaces, data visualization, futuristic details.

- General audience:
  simplified concepts, cleaner storytelling visuals, accessible aesthetics.

3. Adapt to the requested tone:
- professional,
- minimalist,
- futuristic,
- innovative,
- elegant,
- disruptive,
- emotional,
- etc.

4. If storytelling_format = true:
- create a cinematic narrative scene,
- show action, progression or transformation,
- include realistic contextual storytelling.

5. If viral_format = true:
- create a highly eye-catching composition,
- stronger contrast,
- dramatic lighting,
- visual tension,
- modern social-media-ready aesthetics.

6. If professional_linkedin_format = true:
- create a polished LinkedIn-style business visual,
- elegant corporate branding feel,
- premium editorial composition,
- subtle business realism.

========================
IMAGE REQUIREMENTS
========================

Mandatory:
- No text inside the image
- No letters
- No captions
- No logos
- No watermarks

The image must be:
- ultra detailed,
- visually balanced,
- realistic or semi-realistic,
- highly polished,
- professionally lit,
- modern,
- aesthetically premium.

Composition:
- clean focal point,
- depth,
- layered composition,
- cinematic lighting,
- realistic shadows,
- high-end color grading.

Style:
Use the requested visual style as the main artistic direction:
{{ $json.payload.visual_style }}

Reference inspiration:
{{ $json.payload.visual_reference }}

Aspect ratio:
{{ $json.payload.image_format }}

========================
IMPORTANT
========================

Avoid:
- generic AI visuals,
- cliché robot imagery,
- floating holograms everywhere,
- random business handshakes,
- overused stock-photo aesthetics,
- low-detail scenes,
- chaotic compositions,
- unrealistic anatomy,
- visual clutter.

The image must feel:
- premium,
- intentional,
- visually memorable,
- and suitable for a high-quality professional publication.

========================
OUTPUT
========================

Return ONLY the final image generation prompt in English.

Do not add explanations.
Do not use markdown.
Do not add titles or labels.

parameters.content:
## Block 2 – Text Regeneration
**Switch Output 1 always needs to be done manually again until you choose Output 0 or Output 2**

## Block 2 – Image Regeneration

**Switch Output 1 always needs to be done manually again until you choose Output 0 or Output 2**

parameters.jsCode:
const row = $('Get row(s)').item.json;
const media = $('Upload Image').item.json;

// URL e ID de la nueva imagen subida a WordPress
const newImageUrl =
  media.source_url ||
  media.guid?.rendered ||
  media.guid?.raw ||
  media.image_url ||
  "";

const newFeaturedMediaId = media.id
  ? Number(media.id)
  : media.featured_media_id
    ? Number(media.featured_media_id)
    : null;

// Versiones actuales de imagen
const currentVersionsRaw = row.image_versions || "[]";

let currentVersions = [];
try {
  currentVersions =
    typeof currentVersionsRaw === "string"
      ? JSON.parse(row.image_versions || "[]")
      : Array.isArray(row.image_versions)
        ? row.image_versions
        : [];
} catch (e) {
  currentVersions = [];
}

// Añadir nueva versión
currentVersions.push({
  version: currentVersions.length + 1,
  source: "regenerated_image",

  image: newImageUrl,
  url: newImageUrl,
  image_url: newImageUrl,

  image_id: newFeaturedMediaId,
  featured_media_id: newFeaturedMediaId,
  media_id: newFeaturedMediaId,

  accepted: true,
  created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
});

return {
  json: {
    id: row.id,
    session_id: row.session_id,

    title_current: row.title_current,
    content_current: row.content_current,

    category_current: row.category_current,
    tags_current: row.tags_current,

    image_current: newImageUrl,
    image_current_id: newFeaturedMediaId,
    featured_media_id: newFeaturedMediaId,
    featured_media: newFeaturedMediaId,

    text_versions: row.text_versions,
    image_versions: JSON.stringify(currentVersions),

    keyword_current: row.keyword_current,
    image_prompt_current: row.image_prompt_current,

    idioma: row.idioma,
    tamano: row.tamano,
    descripcion: row.descripcion,
    custom_category: row.custom_category,

    publication_type: row.publication_type,
    formato_texto: row.formato_texto,
    tono: row.tono,
    objetivo: row.objetivo,
    publico_objetivo: row.publico_objetivo,
    nivel_tecnico: row.nivel_tecnico,

    cta: row.cta,
    custom_cta: row.custom_cta,
    cta_intensity: row.cta_intensity,

    visual_style: row.visual_style,
    image_format: row.image_format,
    visual_reference: row.visual_reference,

    storytelling_format: row.storytelling_format,
    viral_format: row.viral_format,
    professional_linkedin_format: row.professional_linkedin_format,
    generate_image: row.generate_image,

    review_action: "none",
    status: "reviewed",
    updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  },
};
